summary: Iteration 21 Testing Complete - All features verified successfully. Backend 14/14 tests passed. Frontend UI verification complete for reviews, ratings, pincode delivery, and navigation fixes.
seed_data_creation: Created test review via API during backend testing (TEST_Reviewer prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 21 features working correctly. Key verifications: 1) POST /api/shop/products/{id}/reviews creates reviews successfully. 2) GET /api/shop/products/{id}/reviews returns reviews with average_rating and total_reviews. 3) GET /api/shop/reviews/summary returns aggregated review summaries. 4) GET /api/shop/check-delivery/{pincode} returns deliverable status with district info. 5) GET /api/shop/products/{id}/check-delivery/{pincode} returns fee in response. 6) Frontend /shop page shows ASR logo (asr_logo_transparent.png) in header. 7) Product cards display star ratings when reviews exist. 8) Product detail modal shows rating badge, reviews section, Write a Review button, and review form. 9) Pincode check in header shows delivery fee (e.g., 'Delivery Fee: ₹50'). 10) /track-order Back to Shop button has NO target='_blank' - navigates in same tab. 11) /become-agent page loads with full registration form. 12) Admin /admin/shop Add Product form has image upload section for service category (code verified - line 1049-1051 confirms 'Images - Available for all categories including service').

backend_apis.GET /api/shop/products/{id}/reviews: PASSED - Returns reviews with average_rating and total_reviews
backend_apis.GET /api/shop/reviews/summary: PASSED - Returns aggregated summaries by product

shop_page_asr_logo.details: ASR transparent logo visible in shop header (img src contains 'asr_logo_transparent')

product_cards_star_ratings.details: Star ratings displayed on product cards with review count (e.g., '3' for Solar Installation Service)

product_detail_modal_reviews.details: Modal shows rating badge (4.3★), Customer Reviews section, Write a Review button, review form with name/rating/text inputs

pincode_header_delivery_fee.details: Pincode 800001 shows 'Delivery to Patna (1-2 days) | Delivery Fee: ₹50'

track_order_back_button_fixed.details: Back to Shop link has href='/shop', target=None (NOT _blank) - navigates in same tab

become_agent_page.details: Page loads with full registration form including Personal Details, KYC Details, Bank Details sections

admin_service_image_upload.details: ProductManagement.js line 1049-1051 confirms image upload available for service category with '(Service Photos)' label
